item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Ninja's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned ninja─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level ninja to 70 and complete all job quests up through “When Clans Collide.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
